tasks.subject: Task 1: Rate limiting on POST /api/booking
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Reject more than 5 submissions from the same IP per hour with HTTP 429.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/api/booking/route.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] A single IP submitting 6+ times within an hour gets a 429 response
- [ ] The 6th attempt does NOT create a DB record or send an email
- [ ] A first-time IP succeeds normally

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0, no TypeScript errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/api/booking/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["IP submitting 6+ times in 1hr gets 429", "6th attempt saves nothing to DB", "first-time IP succeeds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Honeypot field on booking form
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Silently reject bot submissions that fill a hidden form field.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/booking/booking-form.tsx`
- Modify: `src/app/api/booking/route.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Submission with `website` field populated returns `{ success: true }` but saves nothing
- [ ] Normal submission proceeds as before
- [ ] Hidden field not visible or focusable

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0, no TypeScript errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/booking/booking-form.tsx", "src/app/api/booking/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["filled website field returns 200 but saves nothing", "normal submission unaffected", "field not visible/focusable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Switch email from Resend to nodemailer/SMTP
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace Resend SDK with nodemailer using existing SMTP env vars.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/lib/email.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] No import from `resend`
- [ ] Both send functions use `getTransporter().sendMail()`
- [ ] Reads SMTP_HOST, SMTP_PORT, SMTP_USER, SMTP_PASS from env

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0, no TypeScript errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/lib/email.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no resend import", "both functions use nodemailer", "reads SMTP env vars"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Privacy notice on booking form (Art. 13 DSGVO)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add privacy notice below submit button linking to Datenschutzerklärung.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/booking/booking-form.tsx`
- Modify: `src/messages/de.json`
- Modify: `src/messages/en.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Notice visible in DE and EN below submit button
- [ ] Links to `/{locale}/privacy`
- [ ] Text via next-intl t.rich()

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0, no TypeScript errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/booking/booking-form.tsx", "src/messages/de.json", "src/messages/en.json"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["notice in DE and EN", "links to privacy page", "uses t.rich()"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Update privacy policy — remove Resend, fix section 3
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace Resend/USA mention in section 3 with Netcup own mail server.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/[locale]/privacy/page.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Section 3 no longer mentions Resend or USA
- [ ] Section 3 references Netcup Germany
- [ ] Section 1 has TODO comment on placeholder

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0, no TypeScript errors

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/[locale]/privacy/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no Resend in section 3", "Netcup mentioned", "TODO on controller placeholder"]}
```
